articles.author: The Associated Press
articles.title: India's youth-led Cockroach movement vows to continue protest after police crackdown - NPR
articles.description: The movement, which began as a satirical protest, has evolved into a nationwide challenge to Prime Minister Narendra Modi's government.
articles.content: NEW DELHI Supporters of India's youth-led Cockroach movement said Tuesday they will continue their protest in New Delhi, refusing to leave their sit-in site a day after police used tear gas and baton… [+3237 chars]
